workflow_meta.reference_product: JISULIFE-style USB-C rechargeable portable handheld fan

product_profile.name: USB-C Rechargeable 5-Speed Portable Handheld Fan with LED Battery Display
key_features: LED display for speed and battery level
folding handle that works as a desk stand
compact body for travel bags and commute

specs.suitable_ages: Students, office workers, travelers, outdoor event users
specs.materials: ABS plastic body with brushless motor
specs.package_contents: handheld fan, USB-C cable, wrist strap, instruction card
specs.certifications: supplier to confirm CE/FCC/UN38.3 battery transport documents

product_profile.supplier_name: Demo supplier from 1688 search: USB portable fan factory
product_profile.key_selling_point: A pocketable USB-C summer fan that switches between handheld, neck-hang, and desk-stand cooling.
product_profile.differentiation_direction: Position around hands-free travel cooling with visible battery level and quiet low-speed office use.
product_profile.target_audience: College students and commuters who spend time in hot subways, queues, dorms, and small offices.
product_profile.visual_style: Clean summer palette, bright commute and desk scenes, close-up LED display and folding stand.

image_needs.requirement: Compact white USB-C rechargeable handheld fan with LED battery display and folding handle, placed on a pale blue summer background, professional product photography, soft side lighting, high detail
Infographic-style product photo of a portable fan showing five wind speeds, USB-C charging port, LED battery display, folding desk stand, clean labels, high detail
Lifestyle photo of a college student using a mint green handheld fan while waiting at a sunny train platform, summer outfit, natural light, realistic travel scene

versions.title: 通勤小风扇救我一命
versions.body: 最近地铁站真的闷到怀疑人生，我包里常备这个 USB-C 充电小风扇。它有 5 档风，低档在办公室用不会太吵，高档排队等车的时候很顶用。最喜欢的是小屏幕能看到电量，不用猜还能撑多久。手柄折起来可以直接立在桌上，宿舍写作业、工位午休都能用。白色机身不占包，夏天出门带它比带一堆降温贴更实在。

versions.title: 夏天出门少不了它
versions.body: 我以前夏天最怕等车，空气不动的时候脸上全是汗。后来包里放了这个小风扇，USB-C 充电，5 档风力，出门前看一眼 LED 电量就很安心。到办公室以后把手柄折开，它还能变成桌面风扇，不用一直拿着。颜色是很清爽的白色，放电脑旁边也不突兀。对经常通勤、上课、排队的人来说，真的属于夏天刚需。

cover.why_this_image: Shows the product body, display, and summer visual tone.
cover.required_if_missing: Provide a clear front or three-quarter real product photo for the cover.

feature.why_this_image: Turns the key differentiators into visual proof points.
feature.required_if_missing: Provide real product detail images that show the key feature.

lifestyle.required_if_missing: Provide a real use-scene photo or a supplier lifestyle image.

publish_result.title: 通勤小风扇救我一命
publish_result.next_action: Review the publishing package, confirm account readiness, then publish with the prepared title, body, hashtags, and image order.

faq_list.A_zh: 低档声音比较轻，适合办公室和宿舍；高档风力更强，声音会明显一些。
faq_list.A_en: Low speed is quiet for office or dorm use. Higher speeds are stronger and more noticeable.

faq_list.A_zh: 可以，手柄折开后能当桌面支架，适合工位、宿舍和化妆台。
faq_list.Q_en: Can it stand on a desk?
faq_list.A_en: Yes. The folding handle works as a desk stand for office, dorm, or vanity use.

faq_list.A_zh: 是 USB-C 充电，包装内含充电线，具体续航以档位和使用环境为准。
faq_list.A_en: Yes, it uses USB-C charging. Battery life depends on speed and usage conditions.

sample_replies.reply: 低档在办公室用会比较轻，高档适合户外排队或等车，风力更强但声音也会明显一点。

pain_points.pain: Buyers care about real battery life at high speed.
pain_points.fix: Add speed-by-speed battery duration table to the listing and FAQ.
pain_points.impact: Reduce pre-sale hesitation and after-sales complaints.

pain_points.pain: Noise expectation differs between office and outdoor usage.
pain_points.fix: Position low speed for indoor quiet use and high speed for outdoor cooling.

actions: Use LED display close-up as second image
phase_1.impact: Improve trust in battery and noise claims

new_insights: LED battery visibility is a stronger trust signal than color options.
loopback.next_selection_adjustment: Prioritize fans with published battery capacity, clear charging port photos, and low-speed noise claims.

next_research_seed.recommended_keyword: USB-C rechargeable handheld fan LED display 5 speed
next_research_seed.new_target_audience: Commuters, students, and outdoor event users who need visible battery confidence.
next_research_seed.price_band_adjustment: Retail around $18.99-24.99; avoid premium pricing unless battery life is proven.

audience_takeaway: product image order and shot list
